Who We Are

Sachin Tools Engineering, founded in 2006, is a prominent manufacturer and provider of a diverse range of products such as Core Pins, Precision Components, and more. We also offer Carbide and HSS Cutter Resharpening and Grinding. Our products stand out due to their high quality, variety, and market attractiveness. Our well-equipped infrastructure, industry-vetted personnel, and well-organized units ensure that operations run smoothly and on schedule. We've earned a distinct market position under Mr. Santosh Sharma's leadership, thanks to strong management and industry knowledge, while efficiently addressing different client requests.

process and customer centric driven with transparent results.

customized customer solutions based on understanding.
